hot-magenta.$description: Hot Magenta — Active nav links, primary CTA fills, decorative accent dots — the only chromatic voice in the system, reserved so each occurrence reads as signal

midnight-ink.$description: Midnight Ink — Page canvas, hero background, footer — the deep-space base layer everything floats on

deep-space.$description: Deep Space — Elevated card surfaces, section backgrounds one step above canvas

slate-edge.$description: Slate Edge — Hairline borders, image frame rules, subtle structural dividers

pure-white.$description: Pure White — Primary text, headline color, nav links, button text — the only color competing with the magenta accent

void-black.$description: Void Black — Supporting palette color for small decorative accents when the core palette needs contrast. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

poppins.$description: Display headlines at 700 weight dominate at 110px — the geometric bold reads as monumental and confident, the kind of type that fills a dark page like a billboard. At 400 it's used for nav and small UI labels where it stays unobtrusive.

muli.$description: Body and nav body text. Weight 300 is the signature choice — a humanist sans at near-thin weight against the Poppins 700 display creates a call-and-response rhythm: the headline shouts, the body whispers. Muli's softer curves (vs Poppins' geometric strictness) warm the dark page.

void-black.$description: Surface level 0: Deepest full-bleed sections (video backgrounds, hard CTA stops)

midnight-ink.$description: Surface level 1: Primary page canvas for hero, body, and footer

deep-space.$description: Surface level 2: Elevated card panels, lighter section bands

slate-edge.$description: Surface level 3: Border-level separation, never used as a filled surface
